blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
